info.name: LexBuild Data API
info.description:
Complete collection for the LexBuild Data API — programmatic access to the U.S. Code, eCFR (Code of Federal Regulations), and Federal Register.

**Base URL**: `https://lexbuild.dev/api` (production) or `http://localhost:4322/api` (local dev)

**Authentication**: Pass your API key via `X-API-Key` header, `Authorization: Bearer <key>` header, or `?api_key=<key>` query parameter. Anonymous access is available at 100 requests/minute.

**Documentation**: https://lexbuild.dev/docs/api

**Content Negotiation**: Single-document endpoints support `?format=json|markdown|text` or the `Accept` header (`text/markdown`, `text/plain`).

**Rate Limits**:
- Anonymous: 100 req/min
- Standard: 1,000 req/min
- Elevated: 5,000 req/min
- Unlimited: No limit

Rate limit headers (`X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Reset`, `X-RateLimit-Policy`) are included on every response.

item.name: System
item.description: Health checks, source metadata, corpus statistics, and OpenAPI specification.

request.description: Returns API health status, database connectivity, document count, and uptime.
Returns metadata for all available legal sources, including filterable/sortable fields, hierarchy structure, and document counts.

response.name: Sources
response.body:
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "usc",
      "name": "United States Code",
      "short_name": "USC",
      "description": "General and permanent federal statutes organized into 54 titles.",
      "url_prefix": "/usc",
      "hierarchy": ["title", "chapter", "section"],
      "filterable_fields": ["title_number", "chapter_number", "status", "positive_law", "legal_status"],
      "sortable_fields": ["title_number", "section_number", "identifier", "last_updated"],
      "has_titles": true,
      "document_count": 65000
    },
    {
      "id": "ecfr",
      "name": "Electronic Code of Federal Regulations",
      "short_name": "eCFR",
      "description": "Federal regulations organized into 50 titles, updated daily.",
      "url_prefix": "/ecfr",
      "hierarchy": ["title", "chapter", "part", "section"],
      "filterable_fields": ["title_number", "chapter_number", "part_number", "agency", "status", "legal_status"],
      "sortable_fields": ["title_number", "section_number", "identifier", "last_updated"],
      "has_titles": true,
      "document_count": 260000
    },
    {
      "id": "fr",
      "name": "Federal Register",
      "short_name": "FR",
      "description": "Daily journal of the U.S. Government containing rules, proposed rules, notices, and presidential documents.",
      "url_prefix": "/fr",
      "hierarchy": ["year", "month", "document"],
      "filterable_fields": ["document_type", "agency", "publication_date", "effective_date"],
      "sortable_fields": ["publication_date", "document_number", "identifier"],
      "has_titles": false,
      "document_count": 725000
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "api_version": "v1",
    "timestamp": "2026-04-10T12:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description: Returns aggregate statistics for the entire corpus: total documents, per-source breakdowns, title counts, date ranges, and document type distributions.
Returns the auto-generated OpenAPI 3.1 specification document describing all API endpoints, schemas, and parameters.

item.name: Search
item.description: Full-text search across all sources powered by Meilisearch. Supports filtering by source, document type, agency, date range, and custom facets.

request.description: Search across all sources with default settings (20 results, relevance sort, highlights enabled, source+status facets).

response.name: Search Results

query.description: Filter to a single source: usc, ecfr, or fr

request.description: Search within a specific source (usc, ecfr, or fr).
Search with multiple filters combined: source, document type, and date range.

query.description: Sort: relevance, publication_date, -publication_date, title_number, identifier, document_number

request.description: Paginated search with custom limit and sort order.

query.description: Comma-separated: source, title_number, document_type, agency, status, granularity, publication_date

request.description: Search with custom facet distribution fields. Default facets are source,status.
Search with highlighted snippets disabled for cleaner programmatic consumption.

item.name: U.S. Code
item.description: Endpoints for the United States Code — 54 titles of general and permanent federal statutes.

request.description: List USC documents with default pagination (20 results, sorted by identifier).

response.name: Document List
response.body:
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "_us_usc_t1_s1",
      "identifier": "/us/usc/t1/s1",
      "source": "usc",
      "metadata": {
        "display_title": "§ 1. Words denoting number, gender, and so forth",
        "title_number": 1,
        "title_name": "General Provisions",
        "section_number": "1",
        "section_name": "Words denoting number, gender, and so forth",
        "chapter_number": "1",
        "chapter_name": "Rules of Construction",
        "part_number": null,
        "part_name": null,
        "legal_status": "current",
        "positive_law": true,
        "status": "current",
        "currency": "This title has been enacted as positive law.",
        "last_updated": "2026-01-15"
      }
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "api_version": "v1",
    "format_version": "1.1.0",
    "timestamp": "2026-04-10T12:00:00.000Z"
  },
  "pagination": {
    "total": 65000,
    "limit": 20,
    "offset": 0,
    "has_more": true,
    "next": "/api/usc/documents?sort=identifier&offset=20&limit=20"
  }
}

request.description: List documents from a specific USC title.

query.description: Filter by status: current, repealed, reserved, transferred

request.description: List current positive-law sections, sorted by title number.

query.description: Return metadata only, no body content

request.description: List documents returning only metadata (no body text). Useful for building indexes or catalogs.

query.description: Keyset pagination cursor — use the last document's sort key from the previous page

request.description: Paginate using keyset/cursor pagination for stable page boundaries. Use the sort key of the last document from the previous response as the cursor value. Cursor-paginated responses return `pagination.total` as `null` and provide the next cursor in `pagination.next`.

item.name: Single Document
item.description: Retrieve a single USC document by identifier. Supports JSON, Markdown, and plain text formats.

request.description: Get a USC document by identifier. Accepts shorthand (t1/s1) or full identifier (/us/usc/t1/s1). Returns JSON with metadata and body by default.

response.name: Document (JSON)
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "id": "_us_usc_t1_s1",
    "identifier": "/us/usc/t1/s1",
    "source": "usc",
    "metadata": {
      "identifier": "/us/usc/t1/s1",
      "source": "usc",
      "legal_status": "current",
      "display_title": "§ 1. Words denoting number, gender, and so forth",
      "title_number": 1,
      "title_name": "General Provisions",
      "section_number": "1",
      "section_name": "Words denoting number, gender, and so forth",
      "chapter_number": "1",
      "chapter_name": "Rules of Construction",
      "subchapter_number": null,
      "subchapter_name": null,
      "part_number": null,
      "part_name": null,
      "positive_law": true,
      "status": "current",
      "currency": "Based on Public Law 119-73, approved March 14, 2026.",
      "last_updated": "2026-01-15",
      "source_credit": "Pub. L. 80-278, ch. 388, § 1, July 30, 1947, 61 Stat. 633."
    },
    "body": "# § 1. Words denoting number, gender, and so forth\n\nIn determining the meaning of any Act of Congress, unless the context indicates otherwise—\n\n**(a)** words importing the singular include and apply to several persons, parties, or things;\n\n**(b)** words importing the plural include the singular;\n\n**(c)** words importing the masculine gender include the feminine as well..."
  },
  "meta": {
    "api_version": "v1",
    "format_version": "1.1.0",
    "timestamp": "2026-04-10T12:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

query.description: Return raw Markdown with YAML frontmatter

request.description: Get the document as raw Markdown with YAML frontmatter. Content-Type: text/markdown.

query.description: Return plain text with Markdown syntax stripped

request.description: Get the document as plain text (Markdown syntax stripped). Content-Type: text/plain.
Get document metadata without the body text. Useful for checking status or hierarchy without downloading full content.

query.description: Comma-separated field names. 'identifier' and 'source' are always included.

request.description: Get only specific fields. The 'identifier' and 'source' fields are always included. Include 'body' explicitly to get the document text.

header.description: Request Markdown format via Accept header

request.description: Get the document as Markdown using the Accept header instead of the format query parameter.

header.description: ETag from a previous response. Returns 304 Not Modified if unchanged.

request.description: Conditional request using If-None-Match header with an ETag. Returns 304 Not Modified if the document hasn't changed, saving bandwidth.

item.name: Hierarchy
item.description: Browse the USC title and chapter hierarchy.

request.description: List all 54 USC titles with document counts, chapter counts, and positive law status.
Get detail for a specific USC title, including chapter breakdown with per-chapter document counts.

response.name: Title Detail

item.name: eCFR
item.description: Endpoints for the Electronic Code of Federal Regulations — 50 titles of federal regulations updated daily.

request.description: List eCFR documents with default pagination (20 results, sorted by identifier).
List documents from a specific CFR title.
List eCFR documents from a specific regulatory agency.
List eCFR documents within a specific CFR part (e.g., Part 240 — Securities Exchange Act rules).

query.description: Return metadata only, no body content

request.description: List documents returning only metadata (no body text).

item.name: Single Document
item.description: Retrieve a single eCFR document by identifier. Supports JSON, Markdown, and plain text formats.

request.description: Get an eCFR document by identifier. Accepts shorthand (t17/s240.10b-5) or full identifier (/us/cfr/t17/s240.10b-5). Metadata includes eCFR-specific fields: authority, regulatory_source, agency, cfr_part, cfr_subpart.

response.name: Document (JSON)
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "id": "660e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440001",
    "identifier": "/us/cfr/t17/s240.10b-5",
    "source": "ecfr",
    "metadata": {
      "identifier": "/us/cfr/t17/s240.10b-5",
      "source": "ecfr",
      "legal_status": "current",
      "display_title": "§ 240.10b-5. Employment of manipulative and deceptive devices.",
      "title_number": 17,
      "title_name": "Commodity and Securities Exchanges",
      "section_number": "240.10b-5",
      "section_name": "Employment of manipulative and deceptive devices.",
      "chapter_number": "II",
      "chapter_name": "Securities and Exchange Commission",
      "part_number": "240",
      "part_name": "General Rules and Regulations, Securities Exchange Act of 1934",
      "status": "current",
      "authority": "15 U.S.C. 78a et seq.",

  },
  "meta": {
    "api_version": "v1",
    "format_version": "1.0",
    "timestamp": "2026-04-10T12:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description: Get the document as raw Markdown with YAML frontmatter. Content-Type: text/markdown.
Get the document as plain text (Markdown syntax stripped). Content-Type: text/plain.
Get document metadata without the body text.
List all 50 CFR titles with document counts and chapter counts.
Get detail for a specific CFR title, including chapter breakdown with per-chapter document counts.

item.name: Federal Register
item.description: Endpoints for the Federal Register — daily journal of the U.S. Government containing rules, proposed rules, notices, and presidential documents.

item.name: Documents
item.description: List and filter Federal Register documents.

request.description: List FR documents with default pagination (20 results, sorted newest first).
List Federal Register documents filtered by document type.
List FR documents published within a date range.
List Federal Register documents from a specific agency.
List FR documents by effective date. Useful for finding rules that take effect in a given period.
List documents returning only metadata (no body text).

item.name: Single Document
item.description: Retrieve a single Federal Register document by identifier. Supports JSON, Markdown, and plain text formats.

request.description: Get an FR document by identifier. Accepts document number (2026-06029) or full identifier (/us/fr/2026-06029). Metadata includes FR-specific fields: document_number, document_type, publication_date, agencies, fr_citation, fr_volume, effective_date, comments_close_date, fr_action, docket_ids, cfr_references.

request.description: List all years with Federal Register documents and their document counts.
